Apple___Apple_scab: Fungicide spray karo — Captan ya Mancozeb use karo
Apple___Black_rot: Infected branches kato, Copper-based fungicide spray karo
Apple___Cedar_apple_rust: Myclobutanil fungicide use karo, infected patte hatao
Apple___healthy: ✅ Plant healthy hai — koi treatment nahi chahiye
Blueberry___healthy: ✅ Plant healthy hai — koi treatment nahi chahiye
Corn_(maize)___Common_rust_: Resistant varieties lagao, Propiconazole spray karo
Grape___Esca_(Black_Measles): Infected wood kato, wound sealant lagao
Orange___Haunglongbing_(Citrus_greening): ⚠️ Koi cure nahi — infected tree hatao
Potato___Late_blight: Metalaxyl fungicide use karo — jaldi karo warna poori fasal barbad
Squash___Powdery_mildew: Potassium bicarbonate ya Neem oil spray karo
Strawberry___Leaf_scorch: Infected patte hatao, Captan fungicide spray karo
Tomato___Spider_mites Two-spotted_spider: Miticide ya Neem oil spray karo
Tomato___Tomato_Yellow_Leaf_Curl_Virus: ⚠️ Koi cure nahi — infected plant hatao, whitefly control karo
Tomato___Tomato_mosaic_virus: ⚠️ Koi cure nahi — infected plant hatao
